description: Template-owned v3 Agent routes. Targets and activation conditions are structured; project-local legacy strings are parsed conservatively and never auto-select conditional prose.

hooks.when: A new Agent session starts in this repository.

read.note: devrules/memory/project-profile.md when project shape or commands are not already known
devrules/scripts/runtime-location.md when this is the shared template workspace
devrules/registry/README.md when this is the shared template workspace

run: devrules template status when this is the shared template workspace before template writes or synchronization

before the first local write in a GitHub-backed repository, fetch and prove a clean attached branch with configured upstream and ahead=0/behind=0; unresolved dirty/diverged/unverified state blocks edits
devrules idle agent-status --json on Windows or macOS; SessionStart is read-only unless the user or device-local runtime explicitly enables scheduler auto-repair

hooks.when: Simulator boot or memory pressure, idle Simulator.app/processes, stale Xcode DerivedData, CoreSimulator caches, stale Rust target/ or SwiftPM .build directories, long-unused Apple/Rust/Swift/Gradle build caches, an active toolchain that requires cleanup deferral, or a missing, stale, unloaded, or unregistered device maintenance scheduler.
promptPatterns: 清理.*(模拟器|DerivedData|target|\.build|编译产物)|((模拟器|DerivedData|target|\.build).*(清理|闲置))
idle resource|free (disk|memory)|too many simulators|模拟器太多|占内存

read.note: devrules/rules/ios-simulator-ownership.md when Simulator devices are in scope

run: defer the matching artifact lane while Cargo/Rust, Xcode/Swift, or Gradle is active; never terminate the build from the global age heuristic; retry after it finishes
devrules idle install-agent --apply only for an explicit manual repair or an explicitly enabled device-local auto-repair policy
devrules idle apply --apply when the plan is non-empty and safe

workflows.note: ios-simulator-handoff.md when a needed Simulator must remain owned and visible

hooks.when: The shared devrules template is opened on a different device after a Git fetch/clone handoff.
A user enables, runs, audits, or repairs autonomous devrules release updates or asks whether projects converge to the latest shared template without manual propagation.
run: devrules template auto-update ensure-agent --apply only after explicit device-local opt-in

hooks.when: Before the first local write in a GitHub-backed repository; before final Git commit/push publication; or when a repository is opened on another device, handed off, or found ahead, behind, dirty, detached, or diverged.

read.note: devrules/rules/developer-service-registry-governance.md when the remote is GitHub
devrules/workflows/multi-device-registry-handoff.md when this is the shared template

run: devrules repo preflight --repo <repo> --fetch --expect-sha <handoff-sha> before editing; without a handoff SHA, independently prove clean attached local/upstream equality after fetch
devrules repo publish-readiness --repo <repo> --fetch --verify-host before final commit/push; classify intentional unfinished branches with --wip-branches
devrules repo handoff --repo <repo> --fetch after committing and pushing

hooks.when: Before non-trivial code or documentation edits.
promptPatterns: 代码|编码|开发|实现|新增|修改|修复|重构|优化|测试|迁移|删除

read.target: matching devrules/profiles/*.md language profile only when repository guidance is insufficient

read.note: devrules/rules/architecture-governance.md only for medium+ or cross-boundary changes

workflows.note: architecture-change-review.md when adding a medium+ feature, broad behavior, shared capability, or cross-boundary change
documentation-update.md when structure/interfaces change

hooks.when: Production code, tests, scripts, build logic, or executable configuration changed.
run: only the repository-native checks selected by the verification tier

workflows.note: debug-root-cause.md when a check fails

hooks.when: A PRD, product brief, requirements document, research package, or redesign defines or materially changes user-facing capabilities, product domains, primary navigation, broad journeys, ownership, or visible states.
promptPatterns: 需求文档|产品需求|产品定义|产品架构

read.note: current PRD, product/IA baseline, production behavior, DESIGN.md, and acceptance evidence when present

workflows.note: design-read.md after a passing product-readiness verdict when UI is in scope
architecture-change-review.md after a passing product-readiness verdict when technical implementation is in scope

hooks.when: A user requests a medium+ feature, broad behavior change, shared capability, or implementation spanning multiple modules.
promptPatterns: 新功能|大功能|共享能力

read.note: devrules/workflows/product-architecture-review.md when user-facing product inputs define capabilities, domains, navigation, broad journeys, ownership, or visible states
devrules/templates/product-architecture-brief.md when the product-architecture gate applies

workflows.note: product-architecture-review.md before architecture-change-review.md when its applicability is required

hooks.when: Substantive iOS/iPadOS development begins while the account/data decision is missing or stale, or persistence, iCloud/CloudKit, Sign in with Apple/Google, email login, data ownership, primary keys, collaboration, account recovery, or account migration is introduced or materially changed. Purely visual, copy-only, or mechanical UI work with no account/data boundary may defer the initial artifact.
promptPatterns: (account|login|登录|账号|账户).*(ios|iphone|ipad|app)|((ios|iphone|ipad|app).*(account|login|登录|账号|账户))

read.target: project-local approved iOS account/data decision artifact when present, using the single-app path or applicable app-id path

read.note: devrules/templates/sync/local-first-sync.md when local-first or iCloud sync is selected
devrules/templates/auth/auth-session.md when any Apple, Google, email, or other app login/authentication is in scope
devrules/workflows/product-architecture-review.md when starting a new app or changing broad product ownership
devrules/workflows/production-change.md when a released app changes identity lane or persistent ownership
devrules/workflows/apple-app-store-launch.md when mainland China availability or filing assumptions are in scope

workflows.note: product-architecture-review.md when starting a new app or changing broad product ownership
architecture-change-review.md when an existing implementation boundary changes
production-change.md when a released app changes identity lane or persistent ownership
apple-app-store-launch.md when mainland China availability or filing assumptions are in scope

hooks.when: A task plans, implements, reviews, tests, tunes, profiles, packages, or releases a game; or the repository contains a Godot project.godot file.

workflows.note: game-preproduction.md when defining vision, scope, pillars, prototype goals, or a vertical slice
game-design-change.md when changing gameplay rules, player experience, progression, or system behavior
godot-module-architecture.md when changing Godot scenes, nodes, resources, autoloads, signals, or module boundaries
game-asset-integration.md when importing or integrating art, audio, animation, levels, or other content
game-prototype-playtest.md when building a prototype or planning, running, and evaluating a playtest
game-data-balance.md when tuning data-driven balance or progression values
game-save-compatibility.md when save data, persistence, checkpoints, or schema compatibility changes
game-performance-profiling.md when frame time, loading, memory, rendering, physics, or runtime budgets are in scope
game-qa-regression.md when verifying gameplay behavior or preventing regressions
godot-export-release.md when export presets, packaging, platform builds, or game release readiness are in scope
game-retrospective.md when closing an iteration or distilling reusable game-development lessons

hooks.when: An iOS, iPadOS, Catalyst, simulator, Xcode Canvas, package resolution, dependency scanning, module resolution, SDK, or signing build failure appears.

read.note: devrules/workflows/debug-root-cause.md after the primary triage workflow when broader root-cause analysis is needed
devrules/workflows/ios-live-preview-ui-iteration.md when Canvas or live-preview behavior is involved
devrules/workflows/macos-credential-prompts.md when signing, Keychain, password, or Apple credential prompts are involved

read.target: nearest README anchors for the app target, package manifest, lockfile, and build scripts

workflows.note: debug-root-cause.md after ios-build-error-triage.md when broader root-cause analysis is needed
ios-live-preview-ui-iteration.md when Canvas or live-preview behavior is involved
macos-credential-prompts.md when signing or credential prompts are involved

hooks.when: An iOS/Xcode task needs local build or test evidence on a Simulator.

read.note: devrules/rules/ios-simulator-ownership.md when a Simulator is used

run: node devrules/scripts/xcode-verification-plan.mjs with explicit container, scheme, UDID, DerivedData, tier, and focused test targets
one build-for-testing followed by reusable test-without-building batches

workflows.note: ios-simulator-handoff.md when UI tests or visible Simulator control are required

hooks.when: A test, build, lint, browser check, runtime path, or repeated attempt fails.
promptPatterns: 报错|失败|崩溃|异常|坏了|不工作|无法

hooks.when: The user reports flashing terminal windows, visible cmd.exe/PowerShell windows, or dev-server console popup flicker.
promptPatterns: 弹窗.*(终端|命令行)|终端.*弹窗

hooks.when: A task may trigger, or the user reports, macOS Keychain, signing private-key, password, Allow/Deny, Always Allow, sudo, or privacy/security dialogs.

read.note: devrules/templates/security/local-security.md when designing product credential storage

hooks.when: An Agent opens, switches, launches, visually verifies, or hands off an iOS Simulator; an External Display window appears; or multiple projects, UI tests, or workers may contend for the Simulator foreground.

read.note: devrules/workflows/debug-root-cause.md when the wrong window or repeated focus change is already occurring
devrules/workflows/idle-resource-maintenance.md when Booted count exceeds the soft target and sustained pressure or explicit lag is present

run: node devrules/scripts/idle-resource-maintenance.mjs pressure when Booted simulators exceed the soft target and sustained pressure or explicit lag is present; count alone is report-only; report in the observing task and never message another task without an explicit user instruction

workflows.note: idle-resource-maintenance.md when Booted count exceeds the soft target and sustained pressure or explicit lag is present
debug-root-cause.md when the wrong window or repeated focus change is already occurring

hooks.when: An iOS app task involves UI changes, frontend interactions, live preview, hot reload, Xcode Canvas, Storybook/Widgetbook/catalog previews, simulator-preview mismatch, or iPhone/iPad visual verification.

read.note: devrules/rules/ios-simulator-ownership.md when Simulator runtime verification or handoff is involved
devrules/workflows/ios-simulator-handoff.md when Simulator runtime verification or handoff is involved

read.target: nearest README anchors for the iOS app root, screen, component, route, preview, story, or fixture files

run: node devrules/scripts/ios-simulator-profile.mjs --profile devrules/memory/ios-simulator-device-profile.json before persistent Simulator runtime verification

workflows.note: ios-simulator-handoff.md when Simulator runtime verification or handoff is involved
debug-root-cause.md when preview, build, package, or hot-reload behavior fails
design-change.md when the task is a visual styling adjustment
design-refactor-existing-project.md when the task is a broad existing-UI refactor

hooks.when: A project adds multilingual support, changes supported locales, localization resources, app language settings, user-facing source copy, bundled content templates, or asks to automate localization/content update detection.

read.note: devrules/templates/i18n/hardcoded-scan.md when existing hardcoded user-facing copy must be migrated
devrules/templates/i18n/content-change-detection.md when source copy or bundled content changes must be detected over time
devrules/templates/i18n/translation-automation.md when translation generation or updates are requested

run: node devrules/scripts/i18n-maintenance.mjs plan --repo <repo> when source units were added or changed

workflows.note: debug-root-cause.md when i18n checks fail

hooks.when: A durable decision, repeated user preference, repeated failure, or reusable lesson appears.
promptPatterns: 记住|以后都|每次都|remember (this|that)|from now on

workflows.note: devrules-memory-maintenance.md when compaction is needed

hooks.when: A completed task reveals a durable project convention, command, source-root fact, reusable lesson, or template improvement idea.
A shared devrules template file changes, especially workflows, rules, templates, scripts, hooks, or root template files.
run: devrules workspace sync-template --registered --apply after reviewing dry-run copy/conflict summary

workflows.note: devrules-script-automation.md when scripts changed

hooks.when: The user asks to initialize or upgrade sibling Git repositories from a shared devrules template directory.
An Agent adds, changes, or runs scripts under devrules/scripts.
A task adds, changes, reclassifies, or reviews devrules rules, workflows, hooks, templates, or evolution suggestions collected across projects.
promptPatterns: evolution suggestion|模板演进|演进建议
(改|更新|新增|调整).*(工作流|规则|模板)系统

read.note: devrules/workflows/devrules-template-promotion.md when an accepted improvement should graduate into the shared template

run: devrules evolution collect --root <parent> --dry-run during explicit template maintenance

workflows.note: devrules-template-promotion.md when an accepted improvement should graduate into the shared template

hooks.when: A Codex.app task requests Chrome/browser automation; the node_repl helper misses the macOS/Clash proxy; ambient Statsig networking delays page operations; or the browser session route becomes unavailable.
promptPatterns: (Chrome|浏览器).*(automation|control|自动化|控制|操作|重试|失败|挂起|卡死|超时)
(automation|control|自动化|控制|操作|重试).*(Chrome|浏览器)
(DOM|evaluate|screenshot|截图|页面读取).*(hang|timeout|SIGKILL|卡死|超时|系统终止)
run: node devrules/scripts/codex-browser-network.mjs ensure --apply --json after confirmed proxy-inheritance drift and local-write authorization

hooks.when: A task creates, reuses, rotates, audits, connects, or removes developer-account apps, identifiers, credentials, products, integrations, or cross-project service configuration.

read.note: devrules/memory/developer-services-inventory.json when present
devrules/memory/developer-services-inventory.md when present
devrules/templates/ops/developer-services-inventory.md when creating the inventory
devrules/registry/developer-account-records/<account-record>.json from the shared template registry
devrules/templates/security/secrets-privacy.md when credentials or private keys are in scope

run: perform a bounded provider read-only identity check before any remote write

workflows.note: apple-app-store-launch.md when Apple Developer or App Store Connect is in scope
revenuecat-integration.md when RevenueCat is in scope
supabase-project-operations.md when Supabase is in scope
cloudflare-project-operations.md when Cloudflare is in scope

devrules/workflows/backup-maintenance.md when backup, restore, migration safety, or user data is in scope
devrules/memory/developer-services-inventory.md when present

backup-maintenance.md when backup, restore, migration safety, or user data is in scope

read.note: devrules/workflows/backup-maintenance.md when stateful data recovery or risky migrations are in scope
devrules/memory/developer-services-inventory.md when present

workflows.note: backup-maintenance.md when stateful data recovery or risky migrations are in scope
revenuecat-integration.md when RevenueCat web billing or webhooks are in scope

read.note: devrules/rules/ios-account-data-model.md when persistence, iCloud/CloudKit, or login is in scope
devrules/workflows/ios-account-data-architecture.md when the current account/data decision is missing or stale

read.target: project-local approved iOS account/data decision artifact when present, using the single-app path or applicable app-id path

read.note: devrules/workflows/developer-service-configuration-governance.md when developer-account identifiers, credentials, products, or integrations are created or changed
devrules/workflows/release.md when packaging or build readiness is also requested
devrules/workflows/seo-optimization.md when web/search content surfaces are also requested

workflows.note: ios-account-data-architecture.md before App Store capability decisions when the current account/data decision is missing or stale
developer-service-configuration-governance.md when developer-account identifiers, credentials, products, or integrations are created or changed
release.md when packaging or build readiness is also requested
seo-optimization.md when web/search content surfaces are also requested

hooks.when: RevenueCat, subscriptions, premium gates, paywalls, in-app purchases, monetization, RevenueCat MCP, store credentials, or purchase QA are in scope.

read.note: devrules/rules/ios-account-data-model.md when RevenueCat is added to an iOS/iPadOS app
devrules/workflows/ios-account-data-architecture.md when an iOS/iPadOS account/data decision is missing or stale
devrules/templates/ios-account-data-decision.md when an iOS/iPadOS account/data decision is missing or stale
devrules/workflows/supabase-project-operations.md when a Supabase web backend is in scope
devrules/workflows/cloudflare-project-operations.md when a Cloudflare web backend is in scope

cloudflare-project-operations.md when a Cloudflare web backend is in scope
apple-app-store-launch.md when Apple-specific store setup is in scope

hooks.when: A released product change affects persistent data, schema/file format, API/event/import-export contracts, deployed client compatibility, permissions, billing, migration, rollout, rollback, or recovery.

read.note: devrules/templates/ops/backup-export-restore.md when persistent state changes

read.target: nearest project data, contract, release, and platform README anchors

run: node devrules/scripts/production-readiness.mjs --plan <plan.json> --stage preflight before production exposure
node devrules/scripts/production-readiness.mjs --plan <plan.json> --stage post-release after monitoring and reconciliation

workflows.note: architecture-change-review.md when system boundaries change
backup-maintenance.md when persistent state or restore behavior changes
release.md for packaging or deployment
prisma-database.md when the change touches a Prisma schema or migration

hooks.when: The user asks for release, packaging, publishing, deployment, or changelog work.

read.note: devrules/rules/production-change-governance.md when released state, contracts, clients, migration, or recovery are affected
devrules/workflows/production-change.md when released state, contracts, clients, migration, or recovery are affected
devrules/templates/ops/production-change-plan.md when the production change workflow is triggered

run: node devrules/scripts/production-readiness.mjs --plan <plan.json> --stage preflight when the production change workflow is triggered

workflows.note: production-change.md when released state, contracts, clients, migration, or recovery are affected

hooks.when: A landing page, marketing page, conversion page, launch page, campaign page, or product-site homepage needs copy, creation, conversion optimization, or structural refactor.
promptPatterns: landing[ -]?page|marketing page|conversion page|launch page|campaign page|product (site|website) homepage
落地页|营销页|转化页|发布页|活动页|产品官网首页|官网首页

read.note: the target project's PRD, product facts, current landing page, DESIGN.md, analytics contract, and publishable evidence

run: the target repository's native formatter, lint, typecheck, tests, build, design, browser, SEO, and analytics checks in proportion to the changed boundary

workflows.note: product-architecture-review.md only when the landing-page work changes capabilities, navigation, broad journeys, ownership, or visible product states
design-read.md and design-refactor-existing-project.md for structural refactor
design-read.md and design-new-page.md for a new page
design-read.md and design-refactor-existing-project.md for structural refactor
design-change.md for quick_copy work that preserves structure and product facts
seo-optimization.md for public discoverability and metadata

hooks.when: UI components, pages, styling, theming, or visual changes are in scope; or the user asks to establish, consolidate, audit, optimize, refactor, extract, save, apply, or replicate a unified design system or named style.

read.note: devrules/DESIGN.example.md when authoring a new DESIGN.md
devrules/workflows/product-architecture-review.md and devrules/templates/product-architecture-brief.md when product-gate applicability is required
devrules/workflows/product-architecture-review.md and devrules/templates/product-architecture-brief.md when product-gate applicability is required
devrules/templates/design-product-brief.md only as a compatibility pointer for existing references
devrules/templates/design-page-spec.md before refactoring a specific screen
devrules/DESIGN.example.md when authoring a new DESIGN.md
devrules/design-styles/README.md and the selected style pack when extracting, publishing, discovering, or applying a named style

run: npm run design:guard when the repository has the design scripts wired
npm run design:check when DESIGN.md or generated token artifacts changed

workflows.note: product-architecture-review.md before Design Read when user-facing capabilities, domains, navigation, broad journeys, ownership, or visible states change
design-init-new-project.md when bootstrapping the design system in a new repository
design-adopt-existing-project.md when consolidating scattered styles in an existing repository
design-refactor-existing-project.md when optimizing or refactoring existing UI across screens/phases
design-new-component.md when a new UI component or variant is needed
design-new-page.md when a new page or major view is needed
design-change.md when visual styling changes are requested
design-audit.md when design drift, AI-flavored copy, or exemption cleanup is due
design-extract-style.md when existing project code should become a reusable named style
design-apply-style.md when applying a named shared style to a repository
design-port-to-new-project.md when directly forking one source project's complete UI system

ownershipSchema.shared: Portable system owned by the canonical template. Ownership does not imply always-on activation.
ownershipSchema.seed: Reusable starter system. Template seeds projects, then project edits stay local unless the user requests promotion.
ownershipSchema.local: Project-owned system. Keep it in the project instance unless the user explicitly reclassifies it.
